FEATURED
Masthaven Bank helps raise funds for Depaul charity
Specialist bank Masthaven is supporting Depaul UK, the homelessness charity. The bank has already raised over £3,000 to support people aged 16 –25 who are homeless...

You have effectively combined old and new, innovative and traditional, to end up with the best of both worlds in a harmonious balance.
Mr A Ebrey — Masthaven Bank Customer

Masthaven at a glance

LENDING
SINCE 2004

We bring years of experience in short term lending to our new bank. We’re award winning and we build lasting relationships.

UK
BASED

Home for Masthaven is London, where you’ll find our friendly helplines and expert teams.

FSCS
PROTECTED

All eligible deposits with us are protected up to £85,000 by the Financial Service Compensation Scheme.

HUMAN
AND OPEN

We’re only as good as the people we employ. They’re an exceptional team and we trust them to make decisions.

  • P: 020 7036 2000
  • A: 11 Soho Street, London, W1D 3AD
  • E: info@masthaven.co.uk

©2019 Masthaven Bank Limited All Rights reserved.

Masthaven Bank Limited is a company registered in England & Wales with registration number 09660012. Registered office address 11 Soho Street, London W1D 3AD. Authorised by the Prudential Regulation Authority and regulated by the Financial Conduct Authority and the Prudential Regulation Authority (Register no. 719354).

Your eligible deposits with Masthaven are protected up to a total of £85,000 by the Financial Services Compensation Scheme, the UKs deposit guarantee scheme. This limit is applied to the total of any deposits you have. In the unlikely event that anything happens to Masthaven Bank Limited you won’t have to do anything. For information about the full scope of your protection, visit the FSCS website at www.fscs.org.uk.
